title: UI transformation + slide design system + export
steps: Step 1 [PARALLEL A]: Install dependencies — bun add react-markdown dompurify @types/dompurify

Step 2 [PARALLEL A]: CSS design system — create src/client/styles/slides.css with 5 layouts (title, content, code, metrics, closing), design tokens, 2 themes (light default, dark), 4 accent colors (blue, violet, teal, orange), 16:9 aspect ratio, clamp() responsive fonts, WCAG AA contrast.
Step 3 [PARALLEL A]: Extract MessageList.tsx from App.tsx L310-336. Props: messages, isStreaming, latestMetadata.
Step 4 [PARALLEL B]: Markdown rendering — create MarkdownMessage.tsx wrapping react-markdown with Tailwind prose classes. Replace whitespace-pre-wrap in MessageList.
Step 5 [PARALLEL B]: Slide render function — create SlideRenderer.tsx mapping SlideData JSON to HTML using CSS design system. DOMPurify sanitization.
Step 6 [PARALLEL B]: Suggestion buttons — create SuggestionButtons.tsx. Clickable chips from metadata.suggestions. Only latest message. Hidden while streaming.
Step 7 [PARALLEL B]: Progress stepper — create Stepper.tsx. 4 phases, forward-only, accent-colored active state. Defaults to context for null metadata.
Step 8 [PARALLEL C]: Split-pane layout + SlidePreview.tsx. Chat 45% / preview 55% in structure/refine. Full-width in context/brainstorm. Animated transition. Changed-slide badges.
Step 9 [PARALLEL C]: Theme/accent picker — create ThemePicker.tsx. Light/dark toggle + 4 accent swatches. localStorage persistence. Instant CSS class swap.
Step 10: Layout swap — create LayoutSwapper.tsx. Per-slide dropdown. Free swap between text layouts. Code/Metrics prompt user for missing fields via modal.
Step 11: HTML export — create slideExport.ts (HTML builder with inlined CSS + nav JS) + ExportButton.tsx. Client-side download, no server call.
Step 12: Session reconstruction — create sessionReconstruct.ts. Restore phase/slides/suggestions on conversation reload from message metadata.
Step 13: Backward compat + errors + mobile — null metadata fallback, DOMPurify strict allowlist, mobile tab switcher (Chat | Slides) below 768px.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant messages render as formatted markdown (headers, bullets, bold, code blocks)
Suggestion buttons appear after latest bot response with 2-3 clickable options
Suggestions hidden during streaming, only on latest message
Stepper shows current phase, progresses forward only
Split-pane preview appears in structure/refine with smooth animation
Slides render using CSS design system — professional and polished
2 themes (light default, dark) x 4 accent colors, user swaps freely
Per-slide layout swap with prompted input for Code/Metrics
Download slides exports self-contained HTML file with arrow-key navigation
Changed slides show visual indicator after regeneration (diff by slideId)
Session reconstruction restores phase + slides + suggestions on reload
Old conversations with null metadata render as plain text
All slide HTML sanitized with DOMPurify

risks.detail: Rendered slide HTML must be sanitized. Even with JSON->HTML approach, DOMPurify is defense in depth.
risks.mitigation: DOMPurify with strict allowlist of design system classes/tags.

risks.detail: Model may output phase behind high-water mark.
risks.mitigation: Forward-only logic: stepper only advances, never regresses.

risks.detail: Chat area shrinks from 100% to 45% when structure phase starts.
risks.mitigation: CSS width animation (300ms ease). Placeholder in early phases.

risks.detail: User could click suggestion while streaming.
risks.mitigation: Visually disable + isStreaming guard in createMessage.

context.slide_format: Model outputs typed JSON. SlideRenderer maps JSON to HTML using CSS design system. No raw HTML from model.
context.export_v1: Client-side HTML only. PDF via Playwright deferred to TASK-016.
context.theming: 2 themes x 4 accents = 8 combos. Model unaware. Pure CSS variable swaps.
context.layout_swap: User can change slide layout type. Content layouts swap freely. Code/Metrics prompt for missing fields.
context.user_feedback: Markdown + suggestion buttons are direct user requests. Stepper + preview create collaborative building experience.
